data.title: Market Maker Flowdesk Expands Capital Market Offerings With New Institutional Credit Desk
data.description:
• Flowdesk has launched an institutional Credit Desk to expand its digital asset capital markets services.
  • The new desk integrates lending, borrowing, and structured credit into Flowdesk's existing OTC and liquidity infrastructure.
  • This expansion follows Flowdesk's recent $100 million fundraising to enhance its trading and liquidity services.

data.title: Superstate Expands Into Tokenized Equities; SOL Strategies to Be First Listing
data.description:
• Superstate unveiled a platform for tokenizing and trading SEC-registered public equities on-chain, first on Solana.
  • Canada-based crypto firm SOL Strategies said it plans to be the first to list its shares on the platform.
  • Tokenization is a growing trend in finance, with projections suggesting it could become a multitrillion-dollar market by the end of the decade.

data.title: Meta Is Looking to Enter Red-Hot Stablecoin Market: Fortune
data.description:
• Meta is planning to introduce a stablecoin for managing payouts, according to sources cited by Fortune.
  • The company has hired Ginger Baker, with crypto experience, as vice president of product to aid its stablecoin efforts.
  • Meta's new crypto venture follows the collapse of its previous blockchain project, Diem, amid regulatory challenges.

data.title: DOGE, XRP, ETH, SOL Follow Bitcoin Through the Cloud as Altcoin Momentum Builds
data.description:
• The bitcoin price surged into six figures after bullishly moving past the Ichimoku cloud resistance on April 23.
  • Top cryptocurrencies including DOGE, XRP, ETH and SOL have followed suit, indicating they too may be set for gains.

data.title: Germany Seizes $38M From Crypto Platform Suspected of Laundering Bybit, Genesis Hack Proceeds
data.description:
German authorities shut down the crypto exchange eXch, seizing $38 million in tokens and more than 8 terabytes of data.

The platform is suspected of being involved in laundering hundreds of millions from major crypto breaches, including the Bybit hack and Genesis creditor theft.

Investigators said they estimate that eXch facilitated over $1.9 billion in crypto transactions, much of it believed to be criminal proceeds.

data.title: Bitcoin Sees Surge in Institutional Confidence, Deribit-Listed BTC Options Market Reveals
data.description:
• Bitcoin's rally is driven by increased institutional exposure through Deribit's BTC options market.
  • Robust buying of call options at high strike prices indicates expectations for continued price rises.
  • Ether has seen a significant price increase, sparking interest in bullish options plays on Deribit.

data.title: Metaplanet Plans a Further $21M Bond Sale to Buy More BTC
data.description:
• Metaplanet said it plans to sell another $21.25 million of bonds to fund further bitcoin purchases.
  • The Tokyo-based firm agreed to issue the debt to EVO FUND on May 9, making it the third such sale in the space of a week.
  • Metaplanet's bitcoin stash currently sits at 5,555 BTC.

data.title: Florida Pharma Firm Will Use XRP for Real-Time Payments in $50M Financing Deal
data.description:
• A Florida pharmaceutical distributor, Wellgistics Health, is integrating XRP as a treasury and payments asset in a $50 million financing deal.
  • The company plans to use XRP for real-time payments and to manage vendor payouts across its pharmacy network.
  • Wellgistics aims to reduce banking delays and settlement costs by using XRP, which settles transactions in 3-5 seconds.

data.title: Bitcoin's Price Surge to $104K Liquidates Nearly $400M in Bearish BTC Bets, Opening Doors to Further Gains
data.description:
• Bitcoin's price surged over 3% to $102,500, triggering $400 million in short position liquidations.
  • The rally followed a U.K. trade deal announcement and record ETF inflows exceeding $40 billion.

data.title: Explosive ETH, ADA, DOGE Moves Spur $800M in Short Liquidations, Highest Since 2023
data.description:
• Ether surged 20%, leading a broad crypto rally and triggering over $750 million in short liquidations, the highest since 2023.
  • Major altcoins like DOGE and Cardano's ADA rose more than 10%, while Solana's SOL, BNB, and XRP increased by at least 7%.
  • The rally was fueled by bullish sentiment and a trade deal between the U.S. and the UK, with Binance and OKX accounting for over $500 million in liquidations.
